lessons.description: Detection, thresholds, signals, and why confirmation matters

lessons.title: Prepare, Verify, and Define the Problem
lessons.description: Organizing the team, verifying the diagnosis, and confirming excess cases

lessons.description: Building usable case definitions and turning cases into analyzable data

lessons.title: Descriptive Epidemiology in Outbreaks
lessons.description: Using time, place, and person to characterize the event

lessons.title: Hypothesis Generation
lessons.description: Interviews, context review, and plausible transmission pathways

lessons.title: Analytic Studies During an Outbreak
lessons.description: Choosing cohort or case-control designs under operational pressure

lessons.title: Environmental and Laboratory Investigation
lessons.description: Sampling, chain of custody, and integrating lab and field evidence

lessons.title: Control Measures and Risk Communication
lessons.description: Acting before certainty and communicating under uncertainty

lessons.title: Special Outbreak Contexts
lessons.description: Healthcare, foodborne, humanitarian, and low-resource investigations

lessons.title: Reporting and After-Action Learning
lessons.description: Writing the report, documenting lessons, and strengthening systems
